title: Linear-Time String Search and Prefix Structure · Invariant Lens: Multi Pattern Trie
summary: Scan large logs for many repeated patterns without repeated restart work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 multi pattern trie increment in a verified prefix-based matching engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Extend trie state with failure transitions for multi-pattern matching.
Use rolling hashes with explicit modulus, collision verification, and numeric limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
